notes: Spec variant 1: after a clean exit of session S, gemini is relaunched with the same session UUID (--resume <UUID>) and the same cwd. Gemini appends to the ORIGINAL chats/session-*.jsonl, so the same daemon session_id (file basename) reappears (not a new row); state is ready initially; the first new turn drives ready->working->ready. The arc is asserted per PID lifetime. daemon=full is PROVISIONAL until record confirms resume reuses the same transcript filename.

text: First launch: session appears in ready
First user prompt drives ready -> working
First turn completes back to ready
Clean Ctrl-D exit after first turn
Spec: 'Same session_id reappears (not a new session row)' — the same chats/session-*.jsonl basename comes back in ready after the resume launch
Spec: 'ready -> working on the first new turn'
Second turn completes back to ready (verifies the cycle is independent across lifetimes)
